rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §25.0951, which governs school district truancy referrals. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 25.0951. SCHOOL DISTRICT COMPLAINT OR REFERRAL FOR FAILURE TO ATTEND SCHOOL.
_note: The cited rule concerns truancy enforcement and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions. No conflict exists.
